description: Set of Him and Her watchesBlack steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comforttitan logo at the 12 hour mark date and day aperture at the 6 hour markBlack leather strap with a tang claspBlack dial with silver hands with crystal embellishments on the woman's watchScrew to reset timeTransparent case back for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 30 meters allowing you to use it even when showeringWarranty: 1 year
